articles.author: Ben Noll
articles.title: See where dangerous heat will envelop the Midwest and East this week - The Washington Post
articles.description: The risk for heat-related impacts is forecast to reach major or extreme levels for around 220 million Americans, according to NOAA.
articles.content: A dangerous heat dome will intensify over the Eastern United States this week, pushing temperatures into the triple digits and probably breaking hundreds of records across three dozen states. It will… [+72 chars]

articles.title: America's lifespan has doubled since 1776 — experts reveal what changed - Fox News
articles.description: U.S. life expectancy has doubled since 1776 thanks to vaccines, antibiotics, sanitation and clean water that reduced infectious disease deaths.
articles.content:
Americans today live roughly twice as long, on average, as they did when the Declaration of Independence was signed.
When the nation was founded in 1776, life expectancy was around 35 to 40 years ol… [+7145 chars]
